title: The Growing Rift Between the UAE and Saudi Arabia, Explained
summary_full: Officials say competition between the countries is healthy. But tensions are mounting over energy quotas, regional conflicts and their different visions for the Middle East.
summary_public: Officials say competition between the countries is healthy. But tensions are mounting over energy quotas, regional conflicts and their different visions for the Middle East.

SA.label: negative
SA.evidence: Growing Rift Between the UAE and Saudi Arabia
